description:
Mercantile letter from a Maghribi merchant. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th century. Mentions Abū Yiṣḥaq; the group of the qāḍī [...]; and Nahray.

(There are three fragments under this shelfmark; this is the bottom one in the JTS image set and the middle one in the FGP image set.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
